The '''''Rejuvenator''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] that served with the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]].

==History==
In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="TNEC" /> while under the command of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Warshack Rojo]], the vessel was serving as the centerpiece of a task force based at [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], and was the nearest major [[Warship/Legends|warship]] to [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]—though even then, she was three days away at flank [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] speeds from the [[Planet/Legends|world]].

When the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] was called upon to assist [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] colony, the ''Rejuvenator'' arrived with her task force, consisting of a dozen of warships, including a number of smaller [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]], six [[Ranger-class gunship|''Ranger''-class gunships]], cargo support, and even a crew [[Transport/Legends|transport]]. In spite of Rojo's confidence going into the battle, the ship and most of its task group were destroyed by the [[Praetorite Vong]] in the [[Battle of Helska IV]], the first major engagement of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Appearances==
